channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Dow closes at record high as falling oil prices and easing geopolitical tensions support markets
item.description: U.S. stocks closed mostly higher on May 27, 2026, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching a new record as declining oil prices and optimism around easing tensions with Iran supported investor s...

item.title: Atiku Abubakar Wins ADC Presidential Primary Ahead of 2027 General Election
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar don emerge as the presidential candidate of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) for the 2027 general election after he defeated Rotimi Amaechi and Mohammed Hayat...

item.title: Pakistan to send 200 diplomatic security personnel to Saudi Arabia for specialised training
item.description: The Government of Pakistan has decided to send 200 personnel from the Federal Constabulary’s Special Diplomatic Protection Unit to Saudi Arabia for professional training, according to a statement issu...

item.title: Sentences for teenage boys convicted of rape referred to Court of Appeal amid victim concerns
item.description: A teenage girl who was raped at the age of 14 in Fordingbridge, Hampshire, has spoken publicly about the lasting trauma she continues to endure, as the sentences given to her attackers are set to be r...

item.title: Johannesburg court to decide on bail for Brown Mogotsi amid bribery allegations
item.description: Alleged political fixer Brown Mogotsi is expected to learn whether he will be granted bail after the Johannesburg Magistrate’s Court reserved judgment following arguments from both the State and his d...

item.title: 23 candidates shortlisted for Public Service Commission posts as Kenya sets interview dates and vetting process
item.description: Members of the public have been invited to take part in the vetting process of candidates shortlisted for appointment to the Public Service Commission (PSC) in Kenya, as part of an ongoing recruitment...

item.title: CIDG links Senate shooting incident and Sen. Bato dela Rosa’s departure amid ongoing probe
item.description: The Philippine National Police–Criminal Investigation and Detection Group (PNP-CIDG) has stated that the reported shooting incident inside the Senate and the subsequent exit of Senator Ronald “Bato” d...

item.title: Suzana Magufuli, mother of late President, laid to rest in Chato
item.description: Suzana Magufuli, the 94-year-old mama of Tanzania’s late President John Pombe Magufuli, has passed away and will be laid to rest today in Chato District. She died Monday evening at her home after faci...

item.title: FIDA highlights gender gap in Nigerian judicial leadership and calls for institutional reforms
item.description: The International Federation of Women Lawyers (FIDA) Nigeria has raised serious concern about the low representation of women in leadership positions within the country’s judiciary, despite the growin...

item.title: Bakwena Productions and SABC dispute responsibility over unpaid ‘Pimville’ cast and crew
item.description: Bakwena Productions has rejected claims by the SABC that it was responsible for contractual breaches linked to the suspension of the drama series ‘Pimville’. The dispute follows the broadcaster’s anno...

item.title: UN Report Predicts Continued High Global Temperatures Through 2026-2030
item.description: According to a recent report by the United Nations World Meteorological Organisation (WMO), global average temperatures are expected to remain at or near record levels during 2026 and the following fo...

item.title: Toronto man sentenced in U.S. to 33 years for yearslong online child sextortion scheme
item.description: A Toronto man has been sentenced in the United States to 33 years in prison after admitting to operating a large-scale online sextortion scheme that targeted more than 145 children across the country....

item.title: Freedom 250 State Fair in Washington D.C. reveals music line-up as some artists withdraw
item.description: The Freedom 250 Great American State Fair, part of a larger celebration linked to Donald Trump’s commemorative initiative, has announced its music line-up for an event set to take place at the Nationa...

item.title: Chennai Metro Poonamallee-Vadapalani stretch cleared for operation with 10-minute train intervals
item.description: Chennai Metro Rail (CMRL) has received official approval to start operations on the Poonamallee to Vadapalani stretch, a key segment of Phase II. The approval came after the fifth safety inspection by...

item.title: Federal Constabulary's Special Diplomatic Protection Unit to undergo training in Saudi Arabia
item.description: The Interior Ministry of Pakistan has confirmed that 200 personnel from the Federal Constabulary's Special Diplomatic Protection Unit will be receiving specialised training in Saudi Arabia. This decis...

item.title: Oil prices climb amid renewed US-Iran tensions and Strait of Hormuz disruption
item.description: Oil prices moved upwards again as fresh US military strikes on Iran added more uncertainty to an already fragile situation in the Middle East. The developments came despite ongoing efforts to maintain...

item.title: Dharmendra Pradhan assures action over CBSE evaluation complaints and urges focus on student welfare
item.description: Union education minister Dharmendra Pradhan addressed the controversy surrounding alleged discrepancies in the CBSE Class 12 evaluation and re-evaluation process. Speaking in New Delhi, he said the go...

item.title: U.S. Launches Additional Defensive Strikes on Iran Amid Ongoing Ceasefire Negotiations
item.description: The United States carried out additional military strikes against Iranian targets after U.S. forces intercepted several Iranian attack drones near the Strait of Hormuz. According to U.S. officials, Am...

item.title: Jill Biden Says Joe Biden’s 2024 Debate Performance Raised Fears of a Medical Emergency
item.description: Former first lady Jill Biden said in a CBS News interview that she was deeply alarmed by former President Joe Biden’s performance during the June 2024 presidential debate against Donald Trump. Accordi...

item.title: Tanzania political leaders commit to structured government-stakeholder dialogue
item.description: Political party leaders in Tanzania have shown readiness to support structured dialogue between the government and key social groups in efforts aimed at strengthening peace, cooperation, social stabil...
